tasks.subject: Add test dependencies and refactor for testability
tasks.description: Add serial_test to dev-dependencies in Cargo.toml. Refactor print.rs to extract a pure function for building CUPS lp arguments so it can be unit tested without executing subprocesses. Ensure other modules have clear boundaries for testing.
tasks.activeForm: Adding test dependencies and refactoring for testability

tasks.subject: Write unit tests for config module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/config.rs covering: parse_positive_f64/parse_positive_usize with valid/invalid/edge-case inputs, and full Config::from_env integration using serial_test to avoid env var races.

tasks.subject: Write unit tests for history module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/history.rs covering: can_print with all authorization/rate-limit/guest-printing combinations, format_wait_time for various durations, and JSON round-trip/backward-compat/invalid-entry handling for print history.

tasks.subject: Write unit tests for print module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/print.rs covering: resize_image with generated RGB/RGBA test images verifying output format and dimensions, and build_lp_args verifying command construction with/without CUPS_SERVER_HOST and correct media option formatting.

tasks.subject: Write unit tests for handlers module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/handlers.rs covering parse_copies with all caption patterns (xN, copies=N, case insensitivity, out-of-range, random text, empty).
